title: lasianthus henryi
intro: Lasianthus henryi, also known as Henry's lasiandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is a deciduous shrub that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Lasianthus henryi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can provide health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function.
